endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Deletes a specific question written by the current user.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Updates a specific question written by the current user.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/{name}/answers:delete
endpoints.description: Deletes the answer written by the current user to a question.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}
endpoints.description: Returns the paginated list of questions and some of its answers for a specified location. This operation is only valid if the specified location is verified.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}
endpoints.description: Adds a question for the specified location.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/answers
endpoints.description: Returns the paginated list of answers for a specified question.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/answers:upsert
endpoints.description: Creates an answer or updates the existing answer written by the user for the specified question. A user can only create one answer per question.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.
